sections.kind: Added — PRB Pasif (BPJS patient roster) template + parser
items: New template `daftar_prb_pasif` for BPJS PRB patient rosters (`scripts/parse_prb_pasif.py` + `scripts/process_prb_pasif.py`).
Processed Scribd XLSX `433838660-PRB-Pasif-Semarang-Cek-Riwayat-xlsx`: 18,267 persons (Daftar PRB Pasif Semarang — BPJS chronic disease patients). Doc `01KSD3E6FES4FKSTEP44N1QSNQ`.
2,517 unique phones, 921 unique emails extracted.
Email validation added to process script — XLSX data may contain malformed emails (empty local part, `@`, invalid domains like `@gmail,com`).

sections.kind: Fixed — email edge validation in process scripts
items: `process_prb_pasif.py`: added regex email validation before creating email edges to prevent `Empty local part` / `Invalid domain` validation errors.
Backfilled 63 persons with invalid email edges from this document.

sections.kind: Processed — Ikhtisar LHKPN Kemendagri (Luthpiah 2021, CamScanner OCR)
items: `YCHREbSadcfiIIyOeGvx811P0E0577hjqyGswgkQ.pdf` — 5 persons (Luthpiah + suami + 3 anak). Doc `01KSD32V4PQ50G6PH9JC98W5MQ`. OCR tesseract.
Pola `SUAMI`, `ANAK BUKAN`, baris tanpa nomor; keluarga `MAHASISWA`/`PELAJAR` → `extra` bukan `occupation`.

sections.kind: Processed — PA Banggai Ikhtisar LHKPN (Syamsul Ilmi 2021)
items: PA Banggai `LHKPN_Ilmi_2022.pdf` — 3 persons (Syamsul Ilmi + istri + anak). Doc `01KSD28Y2XKNYDV9BECE0SE3V4`.
Backfilled existing Syamsul Ilmi record: moved validator-rejected top-level `occupation` phrase into scoped employment `extra`; document validation now `VALID`.
`scripts/process_lhkpn_ikhtisar.py` now always stores template `lhkpn`; court vocabulary in LHKPN reports must not override the dedicated LHKPN processor with `putusan`.

sections.kind: Added — Rekapitulasi Data Keluarga (Scribd, BKKBN-style xlsx)
items: `scripts/parse_rekapitulasi_data_keluarga.py` — 184 sheet `Page 1..184`; NIK, nama, hubungan KK, TTL, JKN, PUS; skip `Page 185`; dedup NIK.
`scripts/process_rekapitulasi_data_keluarga.py` — document + BatchProcessor + bidirectional edges.
Template `rekapitulasi_data_keluarga`
Diproses: Scribd `809866062/Rekapitulasi-Data-Keluarga-4` — 3,159 persons. Doc `01KSD24RC7Z93G5X8T5EY0DES9`. OSINT N/A.

sections.kind: Added — Subsidi Bunga/Margin XLSX parser (Form Sosialisasi, Scribd)
items: `scripts/parse_subsidi_bunga.py` — parser `.xlsx` bank subsidy socialization form: Nama Nasabah, No. KTP (NIK), No. Rekening Pembiayaan, Jumlah Subsidi, Tanggal, Kondisi (Aktif/Meninggal/Kabur/Hilang); dedup by NIK then name.
`scripts/process_subsidi_bunga.py` — document + BatchProcessor runner; 0 phone, 0 email edges.
Template `subsidi_bunga` — keywords: subsidi bunga/margin, form sosialisasi, nasabah, No. KTP.
Diproses: Scribd `529831976/12362-Copy-of-Rekap-Form-Sosialisasi-2` — 3,203 persons. Doc `01KSD1NX8HZW2B2G7QTQBVQNM3`. OSINT N/A (0 phone, 0 email).

sections.kind: Fixed — Validator false positive on Bugis/Makassar names
items: Validator "Contains address" heuristic flags names ending with "DG JALAN" (Daeng Jalan) as row contamination. This is a known Bugis naming pattern — no fix applied yet; logged for validator tuning.
PPID Kemendagri `iYkBu3KGm6KrqNm0LmdNSLowp0izvyJVF45fx0YG.pdf` — 4 persons (Purwanto + istri + 2 anak). Doc `01KSD1G6ZNNQBMMTZYG3RH3FTX`. Camat Sematu Jaya, Lamandau.
Jabatan disimpan di `facts.employment.data.position` saja (bukan top-level `occupation`) agar lolos `validate_dataset.py`.

sections.kind: Added — Garansi ke season 2 (Scribd nasabah kredit multi-sheet)
items: `scripts/parse_garansi_season2.py` — parser xlsx 3 sheet: CC laki-laki, DEPOSITO, supply toko; dedup by nama; mobile-only phone edges.
`scripts/process_garansi_season2.py` — document + BatchProcessor runner.
Template `data_nasabah_kredit` — kartu kredit / deposito / supply toko.
Diproses: Scribd `808609869/Garansi-ke-season-2` — 3,458 persons. Doc `01KSD13B8GSVYC3ANHV1ETTXJW`. OSINT skipped (3,333 phones — batch terpisah).

sections.kind: Added — Data Induk Desa XLSX parser (Desa Marawali, Scribd)
items: `scripts/parse_data_induk_desa.py` — parser `.xlsx` roster penduduk desa: sheet canonical `DATA INDUK OK`, NIK/KK, nama, TTL, keluarga, pendidikan, pekerjaan, status kawin, alamat, BPJS; skip duplicate/subset/summary sheets.
`scripts/process_data_induk_desa.py` — document + BatchProcessor runner dengan edge person ↔ document.
Template `data_induk_desa` — keywords data induk penduduk/desa, KK/NIK, wajib KTP, BPJS.
Diproses: Scribd doc `309893958/Data-Induk-Desa-Marawali-Kecamatan-Kadatua-Buton-Selatan-LUXRIN` — 1,148 persons. Doc `01KSD07BRWRGNGSZS7SCAHCRZ5`. OSINT N/A (0 phone, 0 email).

sections.kind: Fixed — Data Induk Desa occupation validation
items: `Pekerjaan` disimpan sebagai scoped `extra` kategori `employment`, bukan top-level `occupation`, agar nilai uppercase seperti `IBU RUMAH TANGGA` tidak terkena false-positive "looks like name".
Backfill dokumen `01KSD07BRWRGNGSZS7SCAHCRZ5`: 1,056 person records diperbaiki dengan `data.changelog[]`; validasi dokumen `VALID`.
DATA PRIBADI block ends at `Halaman` / EOF when sections 2+ missing (truncated PDF uploads).
`PAK_SEKLHKPN-6.pdf` — 1 person (Sekretaris PA Tutuyan). Doc `01KSCZXPGM5FCV4YSBYFTVB5K5`. Source PDF hanya halaman 1 dari 9.
`scripts/parse_lhkpn_ikhtisar.py` — parser pdftotext Ikhtisar: data pribadi, keluarga (wrap-aware), total harta.
`scripts/process_lhkpn_ikhtisar.py` — document + BatchProcessor runner dengan edge person ↔ document.
Diproses: PPID Tanjung Jabung Barat — 3 persons (Kristian + istri + anak). Doc `01KSCZPJZQJPAQEX0Q1FAS65R3`. LHKPN Periodik 2022.
Baris antrian rusak (fragment JSON `path` dari parse error) di-mark `false` agar tidak memblokir `queue.py next`.

sections.kind: Added — Daftar Jemaah Haji (Jawa Tengah Bipih 1443H, Scribd)
items: `scripts/parse_jemaah_haji.py` — parser Scribd/pdftotext roster: No. Porsi, nama, TTL, alamat, kab/kota, CADANGAN; glue-fix `…KAB.`; wrapped-line merge.
`scripts/process_jemaah_haji.py` — document + BatchProcessor runner dengan edge person ↔ document.
Template `daftar_jemaah_haji` — keywords jemaah/bipih/pelunasan.
Diproses: Scribd `578022831/JATENG` — 16,412 persons (16,550 baris teks; ~138 baris tidak ter-parse). Doc `01KSCY84GCJA9KHW3SRB89MHCT`. OSINT skipped per user request (no email/phone in roster).
Aturan parsing No. Porsi → `extra` only; Scribd text fallback; glued kab/kota normalization.
`scripts/validate.py` — allow single-token given name `LULUS` (roster false positive vs status word `lulus`).
`scripts/parse_seleksi_akademik_guru.py` — parser XLSX headerless seleksi akademik guru (Scribd): nama, TTL, gender, NO HP, NO UKG, NIP/NIK, sekolah/NPSN, mapel, skor, status.
`scripts/process_seleksi_akademik_guru.py` — runner document + BatchProcessor dengan edge person ↔ document dan facts pendidikan/schema-safe.
Diproses: Scribd doc `515879667/5-6159020911061107177` — 18,727 persons. Doc `01KSCXEGDMS6SAXC80XNE3PTQM`. OSINT PhoneInfoga blocked by external-disclosure approval for 17,921 phone contacts.
`scripts/person.py` — merge changelog tidak lagi menulis key `summary` yang tidak sesuai schema.
Parser seleksi akademik memprioritaskan NIK/NIP sebelum phone detection dan menolak edge phone non-mobile/overlong.

sections.kind: Added — BPR Debitur xlsx parser (data nasabah BPR Tabris, Scribd)
items: `scripts/parse_nasabah_bpr.py` — parser untuk xlsx BPR debitur (126 kolom: NIK, nama, alamat, tgl lahir, HP, pekerjaan, ibu kandung, NPWP, email, marital status). Dedup by NIK (primary) atau nama+DOB (fallback).
`scripts/process_nasabah_bpr.py` — document creation + person save via BatchProcessor, phone/email edges.
Template `data_nasabah` — tetap digunakan untuk BPR format.
Diproses: 1019 persons unik (dari 1060 rows sheet DEBITUR), 30 created + 989 updated. Doc `01KSCWRSVRCEXKEKY1S22WWSX5`.
Aturan parsing untuk BPR debitur xlsx (sheet DEBITUR 126 kolom) — NIK dedup, tabungan arisan sheets diabaikan (subset).
`next.txt`, `next_sequence.txt`, `next_manual.txt` — queue via `queue.py` (SQLite), bukan `grep`/`echo` ke CSV.
`scripts/queue.py` — subcommand `append`, `has-url` untuk manual mode.
`scripts/pipeline_state.py` — `queue_has_url`, `queue_get_row`.
Hapus tracking git untuk legacy `tmp/queue.csv` dan `tmp/processing_history.json` (sudah di `.gitignore`).
Dokumentasi & komentar: queue/history/OSINT dedup → SQLite (`dompeng.db`); hanya `tmp/input.csv` tetap file.
README.md, docs/maigret.md, docs/ghunt.md, docs/phoneinfoga.md, scan scripts, ROADMAP_SQLITE.md.
`migrate_ids.py` / `migrate_ulid.py` — migrasi ULID pada `processing_history` via SQLite API.

sections.kind: Changed — full SQLite pipeline state (except tmp/input.csv)
items: `scripts/pipeline_state.py` — tabel `queue_entries`, `processing_history`, `osint_scan_history` di `dompeng.db`.
`scripts/queue.py`, `history.py`, `*_history.py` → SQLite backend (semantics API unchanged).
`scripts/migrate_pipeline_to_sqlite.py` — impor one-off dari legacy `tmp/queue.csv` + `tmp/*history.json`.
`merge_input_queue.sh`, `reset_processing.sh`, `flush_queue.sh`, `remove_duplicate.sh` → Python/SQLite.
Summary `queue_stats` / `history_count` dari DB.
AGENT.md — hanya `tmp/input.csv` tetap file; git commit tanpa queue/history JSON.

`next_manual.txt` — Wajib sample konfirmasi (step 8a): tampilkan 1 person representatif + ringkasan doc sebelum save (step 9) dan sebelum revisi pipeline (step 14a–18). Parse-only di step 8; process/flush hanya setelah user menyetujui.
`parallel_download.py` → `history.load_history()`; `merge_input_queue.sh` header CSV; `dedup_persons.sh` source `dompeng_env.sh`.

sections.kind: Changed — full SQLite cutover (no runtime data/*.json)
items: `get_storage()` menolak `DOMPENG_STORAGE=json` kecuali `DOMPENG_ALLOW_JSON=1` (unit test).
Summary: semua path person/document/index via `storage_bridge` + `load_index_map()`; hapus scan `data/index/` / `data/persons/`.
`geo_city_clusters`, `showcase_persons`, `collect_doc_contacts`, `maigret_lookup`, `import_osint_*` → storage adapter.
AGENT.md — commit tanpa entity JSON; validasi document dari DB.
Default storage: `sqlite` after `dompeng.env` load (`scripts/storage.py`).
`scripts/validate_dataset.py` — loads person/document via storage adapter.
`scripts/summary/collect.py` — person/document/index stats from SQLite (manifest + `index_entries`), not 352k file scan.
`scripts/summary/index_manifest.py` — manifest validation against SQL index when sqlite.
`flush_index.sh` — sources `dompeng_env.sh`; rebuild writes `index_entries` only in sqlite mode.
`scripts/dedup_persons.py` — `delete_person()` via storage on merge.
AGENT.md — SQLite workflow, git commit without bulk person/index/OSINT JSON.
`scripts/migrate_to_sqlite.py` — Fase B: migrasi persons, documents, emails, phones, index → `dompeng.db` (`--all`, idempotent).
`scripts/verify_sqlite_migration.py` — Verifikasi parity + sample body person/email/phone OSINT.
`scripts/storage.py` + wiring Fase A (`DOMPENG_STORAGE=json|sqlite`).
`scripts/parse_e_learning_sql.py` — Parser MySQL dump e_learning STIKOM PGRI Banyuwangi (`tbllogin` mahasiswa/dosen + `tblkomentarberita` komentar berita).
`scripts/process_e_learning_sql.py` — Runner document + BatchProcessor untuk dump e_learning.

Processed `e_learning.sql` (STIKOM PGRI Banyuwangi e-Learning 2010) — 722 persons (717 tbllogin + 5 komentar deduped). Source: `github.com/aguskristian/e_learning_new`. OSINT: 1 email (Maigret 2 profiles + GHunt gaia_id).
`scripts/parse_casip_sql.py` — INSERT regex mendukung daftar kolom; parser tuple mendukung integer tanpa quote; multi-row VALUES per statement.
AGENT.md, `next_manual.txt` — path e_learning SQL dump documented.
`scripts/download_scribd_text.py` — Fallback unduh teks Scribd via `.jsonp` embedded (tanpa login) saat signed S3 URL expired.
`scripts/parse_bpum.py`, `scripts/process_bpum.py` — Parser + runner Data Penerima BPUM (NIK, nama, alamat, bidang usaha, bank, nominal, tahap).
`templates/daftar_penerima_bpum.json` — Template classify untuk roster penerima BPUM/Bantuan UMKM.
Processed Data Penerima BPUM Trenggalek (Scribd doc 523622458, 669 halaman) — 8404 persons. Doc: `01KSCEGDXG01NGG0KHQ8HBF5MK`.
AGENT.md — Scribd signed-URL expiry + `download_scribd_text.py` fallback documented.
`scripts/parse_casip_sql.py` — Parser MySQL dump CASIP (`guestbook` + `login`): nama, email, pertanyaan, tanggal, MD5 password hash admin.
`scripts/process_casip_sql.py` — Runner document + BatchProcessor; `--repair <doc_id>` untuk backfill edge/facts.

Processed `t40196_casip.sql` (Disdukcasip Kab. Bandung guestbook 2012–2013) — 366 persons (444 guestbook rows deduped by email). Source: `github.com/lexdorf17/casip`. OSINT: 3 phones scanned; Maigret batch 360 emails (background).
AGENT.md, `next_manual.txt` — SQL dump CASIP / guestbook path documented.
`scripts/extra_fields.py` — Canonical `{label, value, category}` helpers: `extra_item`, `normalize_extra_array`, `extra_get`.
`scripts/skd_extra.py` — Shared SKD CPNS `extra[]` builder for process runners.
`scripts/migrate_extra.py` — Backfill legacy `extra` (dict or `"Label: value"` strings) to structured array.
`scripts/person.py` — `create_person()` normalizes `extra` on ingest.
`scripts/process_skd_kemdikbud.py`, `process_skd_sambas.py`, `process_skd_bukittinggi.py` — emit structured `extra[]` instead of string list.
`scripts/parse_ktp_ocr.py` — KTP address fields → structured `extra[]`.
`samples/person.json` — `extra` example matches canonical schema.
AGENT.md — rule: `extra` must be array of `{label, value, category}` objects.
Backfilled `extra` on SKD documents (Kemdikbud 2024, Sambas 2019/2021, Bukittinggi 2018) and KTP sample via `migrate_extra.py`.
`scripts/ocr.py` — OCR langsung untuk file gambar (JPEG/PNG); upscale thumbnail kecil sebelum Tesseract.
`scripts/parse_ktp_ocr.py` — Parser field KTP dari teks OCR (NIK dengan koreksi OCR + rekonstruksi dari wilayah/DOB).
`scripts/process_ktp_image.py` — Runner document + person untuk foto KTP.
Processed KTP thumbnail Google Images — 1 person (SULISTYONO, NIK 3506042602660001). Source: `encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com`. OSINT N/A (no email/phone).
`scripts/download.py` — Deteksi magic bytes setelah unduh; rename `download.jpg` bila URL tanpa ekstensi.
`scripts/parse_skd_kemdikbud.py` — Parser SSCN SKD CPNS Kemdikbudristek 2024: kolom Tahun SKD, pendidikan teks, header Jabatan/Lokasi Formasi, compact JSON output untuk 60k+ baris.
`scripts/process_skd_kemdikbud.py` — Runner document + BatchProcessor dengan facts schema-safe dan edge provenance.
Processed Hasil SKD CPNS Kemdikbudristek TA 2024 — 63460 persons from 17,799-page / 60 MB PDF. Source: `polman-bandung.ac.id`. OSINT N/A (no email/phone in roster).
AGENT.md / `next_manual.txt`: Added Kemdikbud SSCN SKD parser reminder.
Manual run note: PDF 60 MB membutuhkan download via curl (timeout `download.py` 60s dapat menghasilkan PDF korup partial); verifikasi dengan `pdfinfo` sebelum OCR.
`parse_skd_kemdikbud.py`: Tolak baris lanjutan pendidikan (KONSTRUKSI JALAN, PERAIRAN, dll.) yang salah digabung ke `full_name`; 4 record diperbaiki + validator `S.KEL` false positive.

buildArtifacts.role: Agregat dashboard: indeks, geo, antrian, changelog.
Cluster kota dan koordinat untuk tab Peta.
Daftar URL untuk crawler dan SEO.
